---
title: "Submit Question"
format: html
---

## Submit Your Question

```{r}
#| context: server
#| echo: false

library(shiny)
library(DBI)
library(RPostgres)

# CONNECT TO YOUR DATABASE
con <- dbConnect(
  RPostgres::Postgres(),
  dbname = "Questionk22",      
  host = "localhost",
  port = 5432,
  user = "postgres",
  password = "Aa@0011231238"   
)

# UI
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Submit Your Question"),
  
  wellPanel(
    textAreaInput("question", "Type your question:", rows = 5, width = "100%"),
    
    # Get countries from your dim_countries table
    selectInput("question_country", "Which country is this question about?",
                choices = dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT country_name FROM dim_countries")$country_name),
    
    textInput("reporter_name", "Your Name:", placeholder = "John Smith"),
    textInput("organization", "Organization:", placeholder = "BBC, CNN, etc."),
    
    actionButton("submit", "Submit Question", class = "btn-primary")
  ),
  
  verbatimTextOutput("status")
)

# Server
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  observeEvent(input$submit, {
    req(input$question, input$question_country, input$reporter_name)
    
    # INSERT into your fact_questions table
    dbExecute(con, "
      INSERT INTO fact_questions (question_text, country_id, participant_name, organization, submitted_at)
      VALUES ($1, (SELECT country_id FROM dim_countries WHERE country_name = $2), $3, $4, NOW())
    ", params = list(input$question, input$question_country, input$reporter_name, input$organization))
    
    output$status <- renderPrint({
      cat("✅ Question submitted!\n")
      cat("Reporter:", input$reporter_name, "\n")
      cat("Organization:", input$organization, "\n")
      cat("Country:", input$question_country, "\n")
    })
    
    showNotification("Submitted!", type = "success")
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
